characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: A famous journalist and a news anchor for FYI. She returns to FYI after a stint in the Betty Ford clinic. The Ace: She’s a very good journalist and has won several awards. The Alcoholic: In the first episode, she returns to work after staying in the Betty Ford clinic for her alcoholism. Affectionate Nickname: Jim calls her "Slugger" while Frank calls her "Murph".

characters.name: Murphy Brown
characters.description: A famous journalist and a news anchor for FYI. She returns to FYI after a stint in the Betty Ford clinic. The Ace: She’s a very good journalist and has won several awards. The Alcoholic: In the first episode, she returns to work after staying in the Betty Ford clinic for her alcoholism. Affectionate Nickname: Jim calls her "Slugger" while Frank calls her "Murph".

characters.name: Miles Silverberg
characters.description: Improbable Age: In the first episode, Murphy wasn’t too pleased about him working as the executive producer because of his youthful appearance. Nervous Wreck:More and moreas the show went on, nearly every problem or decision he was faced with reduced him to an anxiety-ridden mess.

characters.name: Phyllis
characters.description: Distaff Counterpart: To her brother Phil.

characters.name: Avery Brown
characters.description: Generation Xerox: He followed in Murphy’s footsteps in becoming a journalist.

characters.name: Eldin Bernecky
characters.description: The Character Died with Him: It was mentioned in the revival that he died, as his actorRobert Pastorellidied in 2004.
